title: [SV] Add defer and message support to assertions
body:
Add an optional message and list of operands to be interpolated into the message to the verification operations in the SV dialect (immediate and concurrent). This message is expected to be printed when the assertion fails, and is emitted as `... else $error(msg, operands...)`.

Also add a new `defer` field to immediate assertions which allows for the emission of `assert #0` ("observed deferred assertion") and `assert final` ("final deferred assertion"). There are use cases in the FIRRTL dialect that will make use of this feature in a follow-up PR.

This PR also adjusts the parsing/printing of verification ops in the SV dialect to accomodate the optional label and optional message parts more easily.
